'''kasulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:joanneumite|joanneumite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joanneumite|joanneumite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kasulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæsilith|kæsilith]] || [[word:kæsilij|kæsilij]] || [[word:kæsilish|kæsilish]] || [[word:kæsili|kæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kasusuluth|kasusuluth]] || [[word:kasusuluj|kasusuluj]] || [[word:kasusulush|kasusulush]] || [[word:kasusulu|kasusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kasuluth|kasuluth]] || [[word:kasuluj|kasuluj]] || [[word:kasulush|kasulush]] || [[word:kasulu|kasulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kasufluth|kasufluth]] || [[word:kasufluj|kasufluj]] || [[word:kasuflush|kasuflush]] || [[word:kasufluf|kasufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kasuluthu|kasuluthu]] || [[word:kasuluju|kasuluju]] || [[word:kasulushu|kasulushu]] || [[word:kasuluku|kasuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kasuluth|kasuluth]] || [[word:kasuluj|kasuluj]] || [[word:kasulush|kasulush]] || [[word:kasulu|kasulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kasuluthul|kasuluthul]] || [[word:kasulujul|kasulujul]] || [[word:kasulushul|kasulushul]] || [[word:kasulukul|kasulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kasuluthuthu|kasuluthuthu]] || [[word:kasulujuju|kasulujuju]] || [[word:kasulushushu|kasulushushu]] || [[word:kasuluku|kasuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kasuluthun|kasuluthun]] || [[word:kasulujun|kasulujun]] || [[word:kasulushun|kasulushun]] || [[word:kasulukun|kasulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kasuluthuoro|kasuluthuoro]] || [[word:kasulujuoro|kasulujuoro]] || [[word:kasulushuoro|kasulushuoro]] || [[word:kasulukuoro|kasulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
